description: 4 new platforms: Kilo, Kiro, Gemini CLI, Antigravity
changelog:
**New Platforms:**
- feat(kilo): add Kilo CLI as commands-only platform (.kilocode/commands/feature/)
- feat(kiro): add Kiro Code as skills-based platform (.kiro/skills/)
- feat(gemini): add Gemini CLI as first TOML-format command platform (.gemini/commands/feature/*.toml)
- feat(antigravity): add Antigravity as workflow-based platform (.agent/workflows/)

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(scripts): remove non-existent spec/shared/ references from init-context defaults
- fix(templates): correct iflow start/finish-work template content
- fix(docs): correct license badge from FSL to AGPL-3.0
- fix(init): fix start process flow (#48)

**Tests:**
- Added 50+ new tests covering all 4 new platforms (templates, configurators, init integration, regression)
notes: No migration required. New platform templates only — existing projects unaffected. Run `feature init --kilo`, `--kiro`, `--gemini`, or `--antigravity` to add new platform support.
